temporal_description: A medium shot captures a woman with highlighted brown hair lying in a hospital bed, looking distressed. She is wearing a white hospital gown and is covered by a pink blanket. A man in a light-colored jacket kneels beside the bed, looking at her with a concerned expression. The hospital room is filled with medical equipment, including an IV stand and various monitors in the background. The audio captures a tense and emotional moment in what sounds like a hospital room. A woman groans in discomfort, her voice strained and filled with pain as she says, "Oh, okay, okay." The man gestures with his hand as he speaks to her. The camera remains in a medium shot as the man, now standing, leans over the woman in the bed. He appears to be adjusting something on her or the bed. The woman continues to look uncomfortable. The man then stands up straight, looking down at her. The woman's voice becomes more distressed and louder as she exclaims, "Oh!" The camera pulls back to a wider shot, revealing more of the hospital room. The first woman is still in the bed on the left. In the center, the man in the jacket is now interacting with another man who has just entered the frame. This second man, wearing a blue and white plaid shirt, is rummaging through a bag on the floor. On the right, another woman is now visible, sitting up in her own hospital bed, looking on. The room is curtained off with an orange and white patterned curtain. Another man's voice cuts in, sounding slightly exasperated and questioning, "Are you looking at her?" The background is filled with the quiet, ambient sounds of a hospital room, including the soft rustling of blankets and the low hum of medical equipment.
